title: xyris membranibracteata
intro: Xyris membranibracteata, a species of flowering plant in the family Xyridaceae, is commonly known as the membranous-bracted yellow eye or simply yellow eye. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Xyris membranibracteata include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion by boiling the leaves and roots in water, and it can also be used in topical applications to treat skin conditions.
